heading: Utility value and tonnage requirements
label: 57303 Utility value and tonnage requirements
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5730346 App.:1160(c)., title V, § 510(c), as added , ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 417, § 753 Stat. 1184Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(91)95 Stat. 161Aug. 6, 1981
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5730346 App.:1160(c)., title V, § 510(c), as added , ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 417, § 753 Stat. 1184Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(91)95 Stat. 161Aug. 6, 1981

children.heading: .—Utility Value
children.label: a .—Utility Value
children.text: The utility value of a new vessel to be acquired under this chapter for operation in the domestic or foreign commerce of the United States may not be substantially less than that of the obsolete vessel acquired in exchange under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Tonnage
children.label: b .—Tonnage
children.text: If the Secretary of Transportation finds that the new vessel will have a utility value at least equal to that of the obsolete vessel, the new vessel may be of lesser gross tonnage than the obsolete vessel. However, the gross tonnage of the new vessel must be at least one-third the gross tonnage of the obsolete vessel.
